items.title: This Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub turns one port into 5 with 4K HDMI, 90W PD, more at just $22 today
items.summary:
Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub

Buy for $22 (Reg. $30)

What we love

Compact USB-C hubs like this Lenovo model can be a great middle ground if you’re looking to add some more ports to your laptop setup without spending big on a full-fledged Thunderbolt dock. This Lenovo 5-in-1 USB-C hub offers a practical selection of ports in a portable form factor, including an HDMI output with support for up to 4K at 60Hz for external displays, 90W USB-C Power Delivery pass-through to keep your laptop charged, along with dual USB-A and a USB-C connection for accessories and data transfers.

items.summary:
The new Nintendo Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle is still available for purchase for what might very well be the very best deal we see all year on Switch 2 consoles – this is a limited run so get in there if you’re looking to grab a console still. But with the new brand new Yoshi and the Mysterious Book set for release tomorrow, we wanted to make sure the ongoing pre-order offer was front and center for folks who already have one. Physical copies of this one for your collection carry a $70 list price, but you can still score a copy at $59.88 via Amazon right now. And, much like the switch 2 console, there’s really no telling how long I will take to see a better deal on this one. Reviews are largely positive across the board thus far on Yoshi’s new adventure and if you didn’t secure a copy yet, now’s your chance.

items.title: Don’t miss Acer’s 16-inch Nitro V RTX 5070 gaming laptop while it’s down to $1,200 and comes with FREE 007 First Light game code
items.summary:
We just spotted a deal at B&H that drops an Acer Nitro V RTX 5070 gaming laptop down to $1,199.99 shipped. This particular config with an Intel Core 7 240H processor and 16GB of RAM typically sells for around $1,400, and is currently listed for $1,470 directly through Acer’s online store. B&H’s offer cuts $270 off that price, leaving you with sizable savings you can put toward accessories or peripherals for your setup. You are looking at some serious value here with this deal, considering similarly-specced gaming laptops with an RTX 5070 often creep well beyond the $1,600 mark. In fact, Acer is currently listing a version of the same Nitro V equipped with the lower-tier RTX 5050 for $1,670, which makes this B&H deal worth looking into. Notably, the listing also includes a FREE 007 First Light game code worth $70, stacking even more value on top of the already substantial discount. Head below for more details.

more…

We were tracking some good, but not particularly exciting $60 price drops across the latest Pixel Watch 4 lineup over the last week or so. However, Amazon has just brought back a far better $104 price drop on the silver 45mm model.
